SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-22-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-22-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE CARRIE ZEPEDA. PLAINTIFF JESSIE HONG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT THE QUEER CHORUS OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT, APPEARING IS ASHER BUTNIK AND MAKENZIE BOYLE. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CARRIE ZEPEDA; CLERK: N.WEBB. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-22-2026 - JUDGMENT.
